title: cyclosorus refractus
intro: Cyclosorus refractus is a type of fern native to tropical Asia, scientifically known as a species of the genus Cyclosorus, which is now classified under the genus Athyrium in some classifications. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus refractus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Cyclosorus refractus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
